Title: The SMBv1 protocol must be disabled on the SMB client
The SMBv1 protocol must be disabled on the SMB server
Reason: SMB1 is still enabled on the server.
Fix: Set SMB1 registry value to 0 or run Set-SmbServerConfiguration -EnableSMB1Protocol $false -Force.

Title: Local Security Authority (LSA) Protection must be enabled
Microsoft Defender Antivirus real-time protection must be enabled
PowerShell Script Block Logging must be enabled
Reason: Script block logging is not enabled.
Fix: Enable via GPO: Turn on PowerShell Script Block Logging = Enabled.

Title: AppLocker policy must be configured and reviewed to control application execution
Reason: Manual review required — AppLocker rule sets vary by environment.
